name: Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados
description: Brazil's Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados (Law 13.709/2018) — Brazilian general data protection law modeled on GDPR. Enforced by the National Data Protection Authority (ANPD).
relationToCloudSecurity: Cloud providers processing personal data of Brazilian residents must comply.
relationToAISecurity: AI systems processing Brazilian personal data subject to LGPD.

license.notes: Government publication. Verify per-jurisdiction reuse terms.

current_extraction.notes: Structured CSV/JSON extracted. HTML from planalto.gov.br + custom parser (extract_lgpd.py). 64 of 65 LGPD articles (Art 57 missing due to source-page formatting quirk).
